title: wedelia serrulata
intro: Wedelia serrulata, also known as the Mexican daisy or green owl flower, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and parts of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of digestive problems, due to its antioxidant and expectorant properties. Wedelia serrulata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
